summary: Backend guide generation was updated to assemble a multi-section “How to Use” string using context, timing, and a detected line type, and it no longer appears to prepend/duplicate the pickup line text. However, due to truncation, the diff does not provide enough evidence to confirm that detectLineType is truly non-constant or that Context is guaranteed non-empty. An unrelated project_state.json summary change appears to add/claim Instagram fetching/renaming work not requested in this BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement real `detectLineType` logic in `backend/main.mo` so that it classifies pickup lines into at least several distinct categories based on deterministic heuristics, and use the detected type to select different guidance.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows `generateHowToUseGuide` calling `detectLineType(pickupLine)` and routing into `getLineTypeAdvice(lineType)`, but the actual implementation of `detectLineType` is not present in the provided truncated excerpt, so there is no evidence it no longer returns a constant value or that it uses the requested heuristics.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated): `let lineType = detectLineType(pickupLine);` and `getLineTypeAdvice(lineType)` shown, but no `detectLineType` body visible

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the generated guide never renders a blank/empty “Context:” section; if no specific context can be inferred, return a non-empty generic context sentence in English.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows a `Context:` section assembled from `getContextAdvice(pickupLine)`, but the implementation/guarantees of `getContextAdvice` are not visible in the truncated excerpt, so there is no evidence it cannot return empty/whitespace.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated): `let context = getContextAdvice(pickupLine);` and `let contextFormatted = "Context:\n" # context # sectionDivider;`

hallucinated_features.description: Project state summary updated to include renaming the product to RizzAssist and adding ability to fetch/add lines directly from Instagram.
hallucinated_features.reason: These items are not part of the provided BuildRequest (which is limited to guide uniqueness, tone/type detection, and removing duplicated line text).
evidence: project_state.json (truncated): summary mentions "Rename product to RizzAssist" and "add the ability to fetch/add lines directly from Instagram"
